test_desc: Ensure that the API server pod specification file permissions are set to 644 or more restrictive
remediation:
Run the below command on the control plane node.
chmod 644 /etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml
test_info: Ensure that the API server pod specification file permissions are set to 644 or more restrictive
expected_result: permissions of the file are equal to or more restrictive than 644

test_desc: Ensure that the --kubelet-certificate-authority argument is set as appropriate
remediation:
Follow the Kubernetes documentation and setup the TLS connection between the apiserver and kubelets.
Edit the API server pod specification file /etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml on the control plane node and set the --kubelet-certificate-authority parameter to the path to the cert file for the certificate authority.
test_info: Ensure that the --kubelet-certificate-authority argument is set as appropriate

test_desc: Ensure that the API server pod specification file ownership is set to root:root
remediation:
Run the below command on the control plane node.
chown root:root /etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml
test_info: Ensure that the API server pod specification file ownership is set to root:root
